message.content:
@startuml
title PB-749 UC4 - Update a Banner on System Management

actor "System Management" as SM
participant CoreNext <<Rectangle>> 
database NextDatabase 

box 'Core Bradesco' #LightGray 20%
    participant CB1<<Interface>>#White;white:white\nas ""\n"" \n'' ''  
end box


note over Abstract : This use case will be responsible to update an existing banner in system management . It must not delete any record from DB but just enable or disable them based upon business rules defined below for each event type received via API call by app side through this endpoint which has been created specifically so far without having another one already implemented yet!



SM ->> CNP: PUT /v{version}/notification/banner/{bannerId} {bodyPayloadJsonStringifiedObjectContainingAllFieldsRequiredToUpdateExistingRecordInDBTableCalledBANNERSWithPrimaryKeySetToValuePassedAsPathVariableNamedBannerIDAlongsideOtherAttributesSuchLikeBusinessEventTypeTemplateHeaderBodyEnableIndEtcetera... } 


activate CnP ; note right of cnp :"Check if there exists at least ONE row inside table named BANNER where column called id equals value passed along path variable during HTTP request made earlier step number two above." deactivate cnp  

alt [if true] then    
   alt [[exists enabled associated]]        
      loop while checking whether multiple rows exist within same category/grouping according their respective types/events etc..             
         break out once found first match otherwise continue iterating until end reached      
     else throw error back client saying something went wrong because more than single entry detected under specific criteria mentioned previously here too!!       
endif    

else return failure response indicating absence thereof altogether since nothing matched whatsoever against given parameters supplied initially anywayz.....so yeah better luck next time folks!!! endif  


@enduml
